summary:
Chlorine-based compounds are often used due to their effectiveness against a wide range of microorganisms; however, they may not always be immediately available or practical compared to more readily accessible options like alcohol-based cleaners which can also effectively clean blood spills when applied promptly.
 The primary focus here should remain on identifying what agents were most commonly recommended based on hospital protocols rather than specific brand names unless explicitly stated as standard practice within those guidelines provided during document retrieval steps above. To directly answer your query regarding who cleans it specifically at an outpatient treatment center setting without further context about staff roles would typically involve trained personnel such as housekeeping services adhering strictly to established infection control procedures outlined per facility policy but this summary aims primarily towards understanding type of cleaner utilized over individual responsible party identification given lack thereof from initial information presented earlier concerning role assignments among healthcare workers involved with patient care activities including environmental sanitation tasks performed post-incident occurrence involving visible bodily fluids left behind after discharge/transfer events etc... In conclusion though there isn't enough detail specified around exact person handling task so we lean toward general statement indicating use case scenario where appropriate measures taken regardless To summarize:

Chlorine-based compounds are commonly used for effective pathogen elimination, while prompt action using alcohol-based cleaners is equally important. At an outpatient clinic, trained housekeeping staff generally handle blood spill cleanup adherence to strict infection control policies ensures proper sanitizing procedures. 要点总结：

氯消毒剂常用于广泛杀灭微生物；酒精基清洁剂在及时使用时也能有效清除血渍。门诊治疗中心通常由受过培训的保洁人员处理血液溢出清理工作，并严格遵守感染控制政策以确保正确的卫生程序。

Clorinated compounds are常用且高效杀死多种病原体；虽然醇类化合物也可以迅速有效地去除血迹但需立即应用。一般情况下，经过专业训练的服务员会在诊所中进行血液污渍的清理工作，同时严格执行医院制定的严格的感染防控措施来保证彻底消菌效果。 Clorination-based products are commonly used because they efficiently kill a variety of microbes; although alcohol-based solutions can also quickly remove blood stains once applied promptly. Typically, professionally-trained janitorial staff perform blood spill cleanups in clinics, adhering rigorously to established infection prevention protocols. 这个版本
